name: Sekka's Light
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>雪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>花</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひかり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you have no Spells/Traps in your GY: Draw 2 cards, also, for the rest of this Duel after you activate this card, you cannot activate Spell/Trap Cards or effects, except "Sekka's Light". You can banish this card from your GY; reveal 1 monster in your hand, shuffle it into the Deck, then, draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Sekka's Light" once per turn.
eff: If you have no Spells/Traps in your GY: Draw 2 cards, also, for the rest of this Duel after you activate this card, you cannot activate Spell/Trap Cards or effects, except "Sekka's Light". You can banish this card from your GY; reveal 1 monster in your hand, shuffle it into the Deck, then, draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Sekka's Light" once per turn.

action: Returns from your hand to your Deck
mst: Prevents activation of your Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your Trap Cards
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires having no Spells in Graveyard
Requires having no Traps in Graveyard
